George Whitfield, who was the 18th century evangelist, was to be the the military chaplain aboard the ship Whitaker as it traveled from England to Georgia. Captain Whiting was in charge of the ship. He had a crew of about a hundred men there, and there were also soldiers on the ship under a Captain McKay.
